item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 56min Ten most-watched sporting events of the weekend. Source: Nielsen 2 22 3 mil

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter Sorry, clarifying that Nos 2, 4, 9 here are all sa
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 3min En respuesta a @JoshACarpenter Sorry, clarifying that Nos 2, 4, 9 here are all same event (NCAA title game), so roll those up into one 167

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 9min Throughout the years, the difficulty remains the same.
Pete Dye’s design still demands precisi
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 9min Throughout the years, the difficulty remains the same.
Pete Dye’s design still demands precision on every shot @RBC_Heritage .
#TOURVault 2 21 7 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 21min JUST IN — Golf Channel is reporting that some LIV Golfers are threatening to not play tom
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 21min JUST IN — Golf Channel is reporting that some LIV Golfers are threatening to not play tomorrow’s 1st round in Mexico City after not being paid for Q1 performances. 41 37 480 32 mil

item.title: JosephLaMagna: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 41min Always a pleasure chatting with Kyle! Cita Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 1h .@Joseph
item.description:
Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 41min Always a pleasure chatting with Kyle! Cita Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 1h .@JosephLaMagna and I broke down five things we changed our minds about after the 2026 Masters. One of them is how many majors Rory can get to.
Presented by @TurtleboxAudio and @hbgolf. 16 3 mil
